items.title: Apple counters US smartphone decline as iPhone sales grow: report
items.summary: According to Counterpoint Research , Apple outperformed the broader US smartphone market in Q1, helped by continued iPhone 17 demand amid weakening Android sales. Here are the details.

items.title: Apple finally found a fix for the M4 Mac mini's infamous power button
items.summary: macOS 26.5 Tahoe brings a new option that lets you start the Mac mini without touching the power button. (via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals. )

items.title: Siri and Apple Home can control Matic vacuum/mop, here's how
items.summary: I've been using a robot vacuum and mop from Matic Robots for several months now. It's a solid product built on privacy and intelligence. While Apple Home integration wasn't always a feature, I was pleased to see support arrive recently.

items.title: Ads Aren't in the Apple Maps App Yet, But They're Coming Soon
items.summary: Apple released iOS 26.5 yesterday with a new Suggested Places feature in the Apple Maps app, which is a precursor to the ads that Apple plans to start showing later this year. There was some confusion over whether ads are live , but as of...

items.title: Color.io acquisition offers more proof Apple is focusing on creatives again
items.summary: Apple's acquisition of Color.io could be a part of its larger effort to rebuild the creative software ecosystem it once dominated. (via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals. )

items.title: Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents
items.summary: Notion's new developer platform lets teams connect AI agents, external data sources, and custom code directly into their workspace as the company pushes deeper into agentic productivity software.

items.title: With 100 JCB e-machines on-hand, this UK rental fleet makes it EZ to go EV
items.summary: An equipment rental company in the UK is making it easier than ever for construction and groundskeeping crews to test out electric equipment options by adding more than 100 electric machines from JCB to its Leicestershire rental fleet.

items.title: AI chatbots are giving out people's real phone numbers
items.summary: People report that their personal contact info was surfaced by Google AI-and there's apparently no easy way to prevent it. A Redditor recently wrote that he was "desperate for help": for about a month, he said, his phone had been inundated...

items.title: CEO Interview with Dr. Jekaterina Viktorova of Syenta
items.summary: Dr. Jekaterina (Jeka) Viktorova is the CEO and Co-Founder of Syenta, an Australian deep-tech company developing breakthrough additive manufacturing technology for the semiconductor industry. With a background in chemistry,...
